mapper.insert: INSERT INTO acd_eagle_users_account (usercode, username, password,status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{usercode}, #{username}, #{password}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE acd_eagle_users_account SET usercode = #{usercode}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
